body:
Closes #2526.

`List::render` panicked when called with an empty list and a zero-height area, because the early-return check only looked at whether the item list was empty and never checked `area.height`. Iterating `0..area.height` with a `u16` that wraps during the loop bounds computation triggered the panic.

Fix adds an explicit `area.height == 0` check alongside the existing empty-list check. Added a regression test that renders an empty list into a zero-height area and asserts it no longer panics.
